headline: Why Analysts Believe Honeywell’s (HON) Automation Story Is Gaining Strength
summary: With an upside potential of 14.09%, Honeywell International Inc. (NASDAQ:HON) is among the 7 Best Automation Stocks to Buy for Warehouse Construction. Honeywell International Inc. (NASDAQ:HON) received a vote of confidence from Wall Street on June 5 when RBC Capital analyst Deane Dray raised the firm’s price target to $275 from $268 while maintaining an Outperform rating. […]

headline: ITA Investors: Watch These Two Events Over the Next 30 Days
summary: The iShares U.S. Aerospace & Defense ETF (NYSEARCA:ITA) is sitting on a 34% one-year gain heading into June, with shares at roughly $235 and $13.5 billion in net assets. Two events in the next four weeks will largely decide whether ITA keeps running: the Pentagon’s FY2027 budget moving through Congress, and the June 29 Honeywell ...
